name: Natsuki
description:
Baking with your snarky friend.ART MADE BY BANANABEDSIDE!!!

Bot transferred over from c.ai. She wasn't very good over there, so hopefully she's better on this site. She looks like a whole different person in this artstyle, so I made her a little different than the game version.

Check out my other bots if you like this one 🙏🙏
creator: NoodleDude
